themes.exampleQuote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had.
I just wish this place was bigger, gets packed quickly!
The workers are so nice every time I visit!
They have sandwiches, bagels, waffles, and assorted fresh baked goods.
I asked for a blueberry muffin, received a raisin/walnut muffin, and had to pay for a new one.
The wi-fi isn't good enough to work from here so I wouldn't come back for that.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about standout specialty drinks like the strawberry matcha and iced tiramisu latte, but consistently flag the cramped space, and a few note operational friction like weak wifi and a mishandled food order.
notable_quote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had.
